<unk[3:0:263]>现在我的妻子茨琪米应该就在柜台那边……

<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:10 84 105 114 101 100]>她每次看见我就会唠叨

直到她冷静下来。

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>欢迎光临～<unk[5:1]>
东风亭欢迎您入组……<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:1]>哈哈，不好意思，<unk[5:0]>
舌头不会打卷了。
我不久前也只是个旅行者，
还没有习惯接待工作……
毕竟，谁能想到自己<unk[5:0]>
会跟旅馆老板的女儿结婚呢。
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:10 84 105 114 101 100]>……不过现在，她每次看见我就会唠叨

不好意思。

我完全沒想過自己會在旅途中
跟旅館老闆的女兒結婚啊。
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:10 84 105 114 101 100]>……不過，現在妻子只要一見到我，

<unk[3:0:7]>いらっしゃいませ～<unk[5:1]>
トンプー<Ruby={2:4}てい>亭へようごぞ…<unk[5:1]>
<unk[3:0:1]>はは かんじゃった<unk[5:0]>
すみませんね
ちょっと<Ruby={2:4}まえ>前まで <Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分も<Ruby={4:8}たびびと>旅人だったもんで
<Ruby={8:16}せっきゃくしごと>接客仕事ってのに まだ<Ruby={2:2}な>慣れてなくて…
まさか <Ruby={4:8}たびさき>旅先の<Ruby={4:6}やどや>宿屋の<Ruby={2:6}むすめ>娘さんと
<Ruby={4:8}けっこん>結婚するなんて<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={2:4}おも>思ってもみませんでしたから
<unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:10 84 105 114 101 100]>…まあ<Ruby={2:4}いま>今は <Ruby={4:8}かのじょ>彼女が<Ruby={2:4}かお>顔を<Ruby={2:2}あ>合わせるたびに
 「<Color=red><Ruby={12:6}サゴノ>SAGONO<Color=white>の<Ruby={2:4}ふく>服を<Ruby={2:2}き>着ろ」って うるさいんで
ほとぼりが<Ruby={2:2}さ>冷めるまでは
<Ruby={4:8}いっしょ>一緒にいないようにしてますが…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Hey there. Welgum to Ton Pu Inn...<PageBreak><unk[3:0:1]>Haha, whoops! Tripped over my own
tongue there.<PageBreak>I was a traveler myself until not too long
ago, so I'm still getting the hang of this
innkeeper stuff.<PageBreak>Never thought I'd give up the wandering
lifestyle—for the girl who ran the inn,
no less!<PageBreak><unk[3:0:266]><unk[4:0:10 84 105 114 101 100]>Although now, every time I show my face
around there, she demands to know why
I'm not wearing <Color=red>Cece-brand<Color=white> clothes.<PageBreak>So I'm keeping my distance until the fad
dies down.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red>SAGONO<Color=white>本身也没什么不好，
我也觉得她穿起来挺适合的。
但是她要让我也穿上<Color=red>SAGONO<Color=white>……

<unk[3:0:266]>光是想想就不寒而栗……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red>SAGONO<Color=white>本身並沒有什麼不好，
我覺得他穿起來也很合適，
但是他似乎想要我和他一起穿<Color=red>SAGONO<Color=white>……

<unk[3:0:266]>光是想像就令人背脊發涼……

<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red><Ruby={12:6}サゴノ>SAGONO<Color=white><Ruby={4:6}じたい>自体は <Ruby={2:4}わる>悪くないし

<Ruby={4:8}かのじょ>彼女は <Ruby={2:4}ぼく>僕にも<Color=red><Ruby={12:6}サゴノ>SAGONO<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:2}き>着て<Ruby={2:2}ほ>欲しいらしくて…

<unk[3:0:266]><Ruby={2:6}かんが>考えただけで ぞっとしますよ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I've got nothing against <Color=red>Cece-brand<Color=white> stuff.
It looks great on my wife.<PageBreak>The trouble starts when she insists that I
wear <Color=red>Cece<Color=white> outfits too.<PageBreak><unk[3:0:266]>Just thinking about looking like that gives
me the shivers.

just a myth.

rows.CNzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:266]>她说在看了村长选举后已经反省过了，
不过我觉得她对时尚的狂热一时半会儿还不会消退……<Size=100>
rows.TWzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:266]>雖說他在看過村長選舉後，表示深感反省，
不過他對時尚的熱情看來暫時還不會消退呢……<Size=100>
rows.JPja:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:266]><Ruby={6:14}そんちょうせん>村長選をみて <Ruby={4:8}はんせい>反省したって<Ruby={2:2}い>言ってたけど
<Ruby={2:6}しばら>暫くオシャレ<Ruby={2:4}ねつ>熱は <Ruby={2:2}さ>冷めなさそうだな…<Size=100>
rows.USen:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:266]>I know she said she was having second thoughts
after the mayoral election, but her passion for
fashion hasn't seemed to fade one bit.<Size=100>

rows.JPja: ふつうのベッド
rows.USen: Regular bed.

rows.JPja: ふかふかベッド
rows.USen: Soft bed.

rows.USen: Never mind.

rows.USen: Until morning.

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}ひる>昼まで

rows.JPja: <Ruby={2:4}よる>夜まで
rows.USen: Until night.

rows.JPja: やっぱりやめる
rows.USen: Never mind.

rows.JPja: ふかふかベッドって？
rows.USen: What's a soft bed?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:0]>那个……<unk[5:1]>一般的床位价格是<Color=red>20卢比<Color=white>，<unk[5:1]>
松软的床的话……<unk[5:1]>价格是<Color=red>30卢比<Color=white>。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:0]>呃……一般的床是<Color=red>20盧比<Color=white>，<unk[5:0]>
鬆軟的床則是……<Color=red>30盧比<Color=white>喔。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:0]>えっと… ふつうのベッドなら<Color=red>20ルピー<Color=white> <unk[5:0]>
ふかふかベッドなら… <Color=red>30ルピー<Color=white>ですね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:0]>Yeaaah, so...<unk[5:1]> A regular bed is <Color=red>20 rupees<Color=white>,<unk[5:1]>
while a soft bed costs...<unk[5:1]><Color=red>30 rupees<Color=white>.

rows.JPja: <unk[3:0:7]>はーい <unk[5:1]>お<Ruby={2:2}き>気をつけてー
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:7]>Got it. <unk[5:1]>Take care, brother.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>お<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さん お<Ruby={2:4}かね>金が<Ruby={2:2}た>足りないです<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={2:4}もう>申し<Ruby={2:4}わけ>訳ないですが…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:12 78 111 116 105 99 101]>Ooh. <unk[5:0]>You're a little short today.
Sorry, brother.

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>How long do you want to sleep on that
regular bed?
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>Sweet dreams until morning, then!
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>Sweet dreams until noon, then!
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 83]>Sweet dreams until evening, then!

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Did you sleep OK? <unk[5:1]>Great. Safe travels,
brother!

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Did you sleep OK? <unk[5:1]>Great. Safe travels,
brother!

<unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:24 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101]>Did you sleep OK? <unk[5:1]>Great. Safe travels,
brother!

それでは <Ruby={2:2}い>行ってらっしゃい！

<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>How did you like the soft bed? Nice, huh?<unk[5:0]>

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>ふかふかベッド どうでした？<unk[5:0]>
それでは <Ruby={2:2}い>行ってらっしゃい！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:12 76 97 117 103 104 76]>How did you like the soft bed? Nice, huh?<unk[5:0]>
All right, then, safe travels!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>松软的床比一般的床<unk[5:0]>睡着舒服得多，
我自己也尝试过。
保证能让您醒来后神清气爽，<unk[5:1]>
精神饱满。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>根據我自己睡過的經驗，<unk[5:0]>
鬆軟的床睡起來比一般的床更舒適喔。
保證能讓您醒來後神清氣爽，<unk[5:1]>
精神滿滿！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]><Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分も <Ruby={2:2}ね>寝たことがありますが ふかふかベッドは
<Ruby={4:6}ふつう>普通のベッドよりも<Ruby={4:8}だんぜん>断然<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={6:8}ねごこち>寝心地が<Ruby={2:2}い>良いですよ
<Ruby={4:4}めざ>目覚めはスッキリ<unk[5:1]>
<Ruby={4:6}げんき>元気いっぱいになること <Ruby={4:6}まちが>間違いなしです
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>Take it from me—a soft bed is way more
comfy than a regular one.<PageBreak>You'll wake up ready to walk halfway
across Hyrule. There's nothing like it
for the stamina a traveler needs.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:0]>哎呀，不好意思，我啰嗦太多了。
请问您要住宿吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:0]>啊，不好意思，都是我單方面說個不停。
請問您要住宿嗎？
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:0]>っとすみません コッチの<Ruby={2:6}はなし>話をべらべらと<unk[5:0]>
お<Ruby={2:4}とま>泊りですか？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:0]>Oh, but I've been talking your ear off.
Are you staying here?

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 48]>お<Ruby={4:10}きゃくさま>客様 <unk[5:0]>そのような<Ruby={4:6}こうい>行為は
<Ruby={2:4}ほか>他のお<Ruby={4:10}きゃくさま>客様のご<Ruby={4:8}めいわく>迷惑になりますので…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:2]><unk[4:0:24 87 111 114 107 72 101 97 118 121 95 48 48]>Hey, c'mon. <unk[5:0]>Quit fooling around. <unk[5:0]>You're
going to weird out the other customers.

<unk[3:0:3]><unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>Sorry. They told me during my training
that if you want to stay here, you have
to settle up at the counter.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>欢迎光临！
茨琪米，有客人来了哦！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>歡迎光臨！
茨琪米，有客人來囉。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>いらっしゃいませ！<unk[5:0]>
ツキミ お<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さんが<Ruby={2:2}き>来たよ
rows.USen: <unk[3:0:7]>Hey there! Look, Prima, a customer.

rows.TWzh: <Size=80><unk[3:0:10]>咦～兩人獨處的時間已經結束了？<Size=100>
rows.JPja: <Size=80><unk[3:0:10]>え～ もう<Ruby={4:6}ふたり>二人っきりタイムは<Ruby={2:2}お>終わり？<Size=100>
rows.USen: <Size=80><unk[3:0:10]>Aww. Is that it for our alone time?<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:7]>好啦，你这样会被客人听到的吧？
况且你穿的这么可爱，这副表情和你的打扮完全不般配哦。
我只要能和你
一起照顾店里的生意就很满足了。<Size=100>
rows.TWzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:7]>喂喂喂，你這樣會被客人聽到喔？
而且你難得打扮得這麼可愛，露出這種表情就太可惜啦。
你願意和我一起顧店
我就感到十分滿足了。<Size=100>
rows.JPja:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:7]>こらこら お<Ruby={2:6}きゃく>客さんに<Ruby={2:2}き>聞こえちゃうだろ？<unk[5:0]>
それにせっかく<Ruby={4:6}かわい>可愛い<Ruby={4:8}かっこう>恰好してるのに そんな<Ruby={2:4}かお>顔<Ruby={4:4}にあ>似合わないよ
ボクは <Ruby={2:4}きみ>君が<Ruby={4:8}いっしょ>一緒に
<Ruby={4:8}みせばん>店番してくれるだけで<unk[5:0]> じゅうぶん<Ruby={4:8}ありがた>有難いよ<Size=100>
rows.USen:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:7]>Not so loud...the customer will hear you. Besides,
you can't pout when you're wearing that cute
outfit. It spoils the effect.<PageBreak>I don't need alone time as long as I get to stand
here and work the counter with you.<Size=100>

<Size=80><unk[3:0:0]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>Listen, the quicker we take care of this customer,
the sooner we can get back to alone time. So do
your thing, Prima!<Size=100>
